'''vanubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myctag|myctag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myctag|myctag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vanubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænibith|vænibith]] || [[word:vænibij|vænibij]] || [[word:vænibish|vænibish]] || [[word:vænibi|vænibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanunubuth|vanunubuth]] || [[word:vanunubuj|vanunubuj]] || [[word:vanunubush|vanunubush]] || [[word:vanunubu|vanunubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanubuth|vanubuth]] || [[word:vanubuj|vanubuj]] || [[word:vanubush|vanubush]] || [[word:vanubu|vanubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanufbuth|vanufbuth]] || [[word:vanufbuj|vanufbuj]] || [[word:vanufbush|vanufbush]] || [[word:vanufbuf|vanufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanubuthu|vanubuthu]] || [[word:vanubuju|vanubuju]] || [[word:vanubushu|vanubushu]] || [[word:vanubuku|vanubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanubuth|vanubuth]] || [[word:vanubuj|vanubuj]] || [[word:vanubush|vanubush]] || [[word:vanubu|vanubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanubuthul|vanubuthul]] || [[word:vanubujul|vanubujul]] || [[word:vanubushul|vanubushul]] || [[word:vanubukul|vanubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanubuthuthu|vanubuthuthu]] || [[word:vanubujuju|vanubujuju]] || [[word:vanubushushu|vanubushushu]] || [[word:vanubuku|vanubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanubuthun|vanubuthun]] || [[word:vanubujun|vanubujun]] || [[word:vanubushun|vanubushun]] || [[word:vanubukun|vanubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanubuthuoro|vanubuthuoro]] || [[word:vanubujuoro|vanubujuoro]] || [[word:vanubushuoro|vanubushuoro]] || [[word:vanubukuoro|vanubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
